problem id: cb31384b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  00100000 -> 00000000
  00110000 -> 00000000
  01101011 -> 01100001
  01100001 -> 00100001
  11010111 -> 11100011
  10000011 -> 01100010
  11100000 -> 00000011
  10011001 -> 00100010
  00011111 -> 11100000

query: 00111001
predicted answer: 00100000
